---
title: "Comparing Inference Methods"
description: "A comparison of NUTS sampling, pathfinder approximate inference, and pathfinder-initialised NUTS across two model specifications."
author: Epinowcast Team
opengraph:
  image:
    src: figures/inference-methods-nowcast-comparison-1.png
output:
  bookdown::html_vignette2:
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
pkgdown:
  as_is: true
bibliography: library.bib
csl: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/apa-numeric-superscript-brackets.csl
link-citations: true
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Comparing Inference Methods}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---



# Overview

`epinowcast` supports several inference methods through [CmdStan](https://mc-stan.org/cmdstanr/):

- **NUTS sampling** (`enw_sample()`): the default Hamiltonian Monte Carlo sampler.
  Produces gold-standard posterior samples but is the slowest option.
- **Pathfinder** (`enw_pathfinder()`): a fast variational approximation.
  Useful for model development, exploration, and quick iteration.
- **Pathfinder-initialised NUTS** (`enw_sample(init_method = "pathfinder")`):
  uses pathfinder to find good starting values for NUTS.
  Can reduce warmup time and improve convergence for difficult models.

This vignette compares these three approaches across two nowcasting model specifications of different complexity, looking at runtime, diagnostics, and the resulting nowcasts.

# Setup


``` r
library(epinowcast)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
```

We use the same German COVID-19 hospitalisation data as the [getting started vignette](epinowcast.html).


``` r
nat_germany_hosp <-
  germany_covid19_hosp[location == "DE"][age_group == "00+"] |>
  enw_filter_report_dates(latest_date = "2021-10-01")

retro_nat_germany <- nat_germany_hosp |>
  enw_filter_report_dates(remove_days = 40) |>
  enw_filter_reference_dates(include_days = 40)

latest_germany_hosp <- nat_germany_hosp |>
  enw_obs_at_delay(max_delay = 40) |>
  enw_filter_reference_dates(remove_days = 40, include_days = 40)

pobs <- enw_preprocess_data(retro_nat_germany, max_delay = 40)
```

Compile the model once with threading support enabled.


``` r
model <- enw_model(threads = TRUE)
```

# Model specifications

We define two nowcasting specifications that share the same expectation (process) model but differ in delay model complexity and observation family.

**Spec A (simple):** parametric lognormal delays with Poisson observations.
This is the specification from the getting started vignette.


``` r
spec_a <- list(
  expectation = enw_expectation(~ 0 + (1 | day), data = pobs),
  reference = enw_reference(
    ~1, distribution = "lognormal", data = pobs
  ),
  report = enw_report(~ (1 | day_of_week), data = pobs),
  obs = enw_obs(family = "poisson", data = pobs)
)
```

**Spec B (mixed delays):** parametric lognormal baseline with non-parametric adjustments by delay category and negative binomial observations.
The mixed delay model is more flexible and better suited to complex delay patterns, but adds parameters.


``` r
spec_b <- list(
  expectation = enw_expectation(~ 0 + (1 | day), data = pobs),
  reference = enw_reference(
    parametric = ~1,
    non_parametric = ~ 0 + (1 | delay_cat),
    distribution = "lognormal",
    data = pobs
  ),
  report = enw_report(~ (1 | day_of_week), data = pobs),
  obs = enw_obs(family = "negbin", data = pobs)
)
```

# Fitting

We define shared NUTS options (tuned for speed, not production use) and a helper to fit a given specification with a given method.


``` r
nuts_args <- list(
  save_warmup = FALSE, pp = TRUE,
  chains = 2, threads_per_chain = 2,
  iter_sampling = 500, iter_warmup = 500,
  show_messages = FALSE
)

fit_spec <- function(spec, fit_opts) {
  epinowcast(
    data = pobs,
    expectation = spec$expectation,
    reference = spec$reference,
    report = spec$report,
    obs = spec$obs,
    fit = fit_opts,
    model = model
  )
}
```

## NUTS with prior initialisation (default)


``` r
options(mc.cores = 2)

nuts_prior_opts <- do.call(
  enw_fit_opts,
  c(list(sampler = enw_sample), nuts_args)
)

fit_a_nuts <- fit_spec(spec_a, nuts_prior_opts)
fit_b_nuts <- fit_spec(spec_b, nuts_prior_opts)
```

## NUTS with pathfinder initialisation


``` r
nuts_pf_opts <- do.call(
  enw_fit_opts,
  c(
    list(sampler = enw_sample, init_method = "pathfinder"),
    nuts_args
  )
)

fit_a_nuts_pf <- fit_spec(spec_a, nuts_pf_opts)
#> Path [1] :Initial log joint density = -14084.668715 
#> Path [3] :Initial log joint density = -14084.668715 
#> Exception: Exception: Exception: poisson_log_lpmf: Log rate parameter[4] is nan, but must be not nan! (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/obs_lpmf.stan', line 32, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 13, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/delay_lpmf.stan', line 64, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 18, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 406, column 8 to line 412, column 10) 
#> Exception: Exception: Exception: poisson_log_lpmf: Log rate parameter[4] is nan, but must be not nan! (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/obs_lpmf.stan', line 32, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 13, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/delay_lpmf.stan', line 64, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 18, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 406, column 8 to line 412, column 10)
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.449e+03      2.987e-02   1.818e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00      8923 -1.640e+03 -1.648e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.449e+03      2.987e-02   1.818e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00      8923 -1.638e+03 -1.654e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.438e+03      2.057e-03   2.709e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     29585 -1.636e+03 -2.042e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.438e+03      2.057e-03   2.709e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     29585 -1.635e+03 -2.087e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.436e+03      4.287e-03   9.589e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     62448 -1.636e+03 -1.830e+04                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.436e+03      4.287e-03   9.589e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     62448 -1.635e+03 -7.065e+04                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.436e+03      6.925e-04   4.281e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    107030 -1.636e+03 -2.145e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.436e+03      6.925e-04   4.281e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    107030 -1.635e+03 -2.656e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.436e+03      4.578e-04   1.165e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    163229 -1.636e+03 -3.743e+04                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.436e+03      4.578e-04   1.165e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    163229 -1.635e+03 -1.001e+04                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             540      -1.436e+03      2.924e-05   2.538e-01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    189831 -1.636e+03 -1.840e+03                   
#> Path [1] :Best Iter: [131] ELBO (-1635.646751) evaluations: (189831) 
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             540      -1.436e+03      2.924e-05   2.538e-01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    189831 -1.635e+03 -1.833e+03                   
#> Path [3] :Best Iter: [131] ELBO (-1634.988662) evaluations: (189831) 
#> Path [2] :Initial log joint density = -14084.668715 
#> Exception: Exception: Exception: poisson_log_lpmf: Log rate parameter[4] is nan, but must be not nan! (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/obs_lpmf.stan', line 32, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 13, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/delay_lpmf.stan', line 64, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 18, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 406, column 8 to line 412, column 10) 
#> Path [4] :Initial log joint density = -14084.668715 
#> Exception: Exception: Exception: poisson_log_lpmf: Log rate parameter[4] is nan, but must be not nan! (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/obs_lpmf.stan', line 32, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 13, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/delay_lpmf.stan', line 64, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 18, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 406, column 8 to line 412, column 10) 
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.449e+03      2.987e-02   1.818e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00      8923 -1.633e+03 -1.656e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.449e+03      2.987e-02   1.818e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00      8923 -1.631e+03 -1.656e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.438e+03      2.057e-03   2.709e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     29585 -1.633e+03 -2.065e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.438e+03      2.057e-03   2.709e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     29585 -1.631e+03 -1.924e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.436e+03      4.287e-03   9.589e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     62448 -1.633e+03 -6.154e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.436e+03      4.287e-03   9.589e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     62448 -1.631e+03 -8.178e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.436e+03      6.925e-04   4.281e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    107030 -1.633e+03 -2.496e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.436e+03      6.925e-04   4.281e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    107030 -1.631e+03 -3.120e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.436e+03      4.578e-04   1.165e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    163229 -1.633e+03 -5.484e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.436e+03      4.578e-04   1.165e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    163229 -1.631e+03 -4.570e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             540      -1.436e+03      2.924e-05   2.538e-01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    189831 -1.633e+03 -1.864e+03                   
#> Path [2] :Best Iter: [82] ELBO (-1633.014784) evaluations: (189831) 
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             540      -1.436e+03      2.924e-05   2.538e-01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    189831 -1.631e+03 -1.847e+03                   
#> Path [4] :Best Iter: [67] ELBO (-1630.867160) evaluations: (189831) 
#> Pareto k value (2.7) is greater than 0.7. Importance resampling was not able to improve the approximation, which may indicate that the approximation itself is poor. 
#> Finished in  3.6 seconds.
fit_b_nuts_pf <- fit_spec(spec_b, nuts_pf_opts)
#> Path [1] :Initial log joint density = -11606.604354 
#> Path [3] :Initial log joint density = -11606.604354
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.398e+03      4.243e-02   3.782e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00      8995 -1.562e+03 -1.618e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.398e+03      4.243e-02   3.782e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00      8995 -1.564e+03 -1.619e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.390e+03      5.551e-03   1.210e+01    5.684e-01  5.684e-01     29450 -1.562e+03 -1.764e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.390e+03      5.551e-03   1.210e+01    5.684e-01  5.684e-01     29450 -1.564e+03 -1.744e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.389e+03      6.058e-04   1.323e+01    5.875e-01  5.875e-01     61440 -1.562e+03 -1.826e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.389e+03      6.058e-04   1.323e+01    5.875e-01  5.875e-01     61440 -1.564e+03 -1.876e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.389e+03      2.405e-04   1.506e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    105090 -1.562e+03 -1.774e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.389e+03      2.405e-04   1.506e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    105090 -1.564e+03 -1.750e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.389e+03      6.514e-04   1.145e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    159865 -1.562e+03 -1.635e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.389e+03      6.514e-04   1.145e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    159865 -1.564e+03 -1.637e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             513      -1.389e+03      3.139e-04   2.405e-01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    168437 -1.562e+03 -1.666e+03                   
#> Path [3] :Best Iter: [61] ELBO (-1561.570417) evaluations: (168437) 
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             513      -1.389e+03      3.139e-04   2.405e-01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    168437 -1.564e+03 -1.662e+03                   
#> Path [1] :Best Iter: [61] ELBO (-1563.994263) evaluations: (168437) 
#> Path [4] :Initial log joint density = -11606.604354 
#> Path [2] :Initial log joint density = -11606.604354 
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.398e+03      4.243e-02   3.782e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00      8995 -1.567e+03 -1.628e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.398e+03      4.243e-02   3.782e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00      8995 -1.564e+03 -1.633e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.390e+03      5.551e-03   1.210e+01    5.684e-01  5.684e-01     29450 -1.567e+03 -1.699e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.390e+03      5.551e-03   1.210e+01    5.684e-01  5.684e-01     29450 -1.564e+03 -1.749e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.389e+03      6.058e-04   1.323e+01    5.875e-01  5.875e-01     61440 -1.567e+03 -1.772e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.389e+03      6.058e-04   1.323e+01    5.875e-01  5.875e-01     61440 -1.564e+03 -1.817e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.389e+03      2.405e-04   1.506e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    105090 -1.564e+03 -1.715e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.389e+03      2.405e-04   1.506e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    105090 -1.567e+03 -1.740e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.389e+03      6.514e-04   1.145e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    159865 -1.564e+03 -1.628e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.389e+03      6.514e-04   1.145e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    159865 -1.567e+03 -1.640e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             513      -1.389e+03      3.139e-04   2.405e-01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    168437 -1.564e+03 -1.663e+03                   
#> Path [2] :Best Iter: [61] ELBO (-1564.162828) evaluations: (168437) 
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             513      -1.389e+03      3.139e-04   2.405e-01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    168437 -1.567e+03 -1.666e+03                   
#> Path [4] :Best Iter: [61] ELBO (-1566.950919) evaluations: (168437) 
#> Pareto k value (2.6) is greater than 0.7. Importance resampling was not able to improve the approximation, which may indicate that the approximation itself is poor. 
#> Finished in  4.4 seconds.
```

## Pathfinder (approximate inference)


``` r
pf_opts <- enw_fit_opts(
  sampler = enw_pathfinder, pp = TRUE,
  threads_per_chain = 2
)

fit_a_pf <- fit_spec(spec_a, pf_opts)
#> Path [1] :Initial log joint density = -11299.286295 
#> Path [3] :Initial log joint density = -11299.286295
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.447e+03      8.684e-02   1.002e+02    1.000e+00  1.000e+00      8830 -1.650e+03 -2.116e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.447e+03      8.684e-02   1.002e+02    1.000e+00  1.000e+00      8830 -1.646e+03 -1.811e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.438e+03      1.747e-02   2.691e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     29496 -1.650e+03 -1.746e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.438e+03      1.747e-02   2.691e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     29496 -1.646e+03 -1.809e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.436e+03      1.612e-03   2.031e+01    9.959e-01  9.959e-01     61680 -1.650e+03 -2.064e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.436e+03      1.612e-03   2.031e+01    9.959e-01  9.959e-01     61680 -1.646e+03 -2.226e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.436e+03      1.714e-03   3.040e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    105267 -1.650e+03 -2.794e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.436e+03      1.714e-03   3.040e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    105267 -1.646e+03 -2.490e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.436e+03      8.248e-05   1.285e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    160746 -1.650e+03 -2.565e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.436e+03      8.248e-05   1.285e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    160746 -1.646e+03 -2.482e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             599      -1.436e+03      7.459e-04   6.347e-01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    227956 -1.650e+03 -1.725e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             599      -1.436e+03      7.459e-04   6.347e-01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    227956 -1.646e+03 -1.740e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             614      -1.436e+03      1.632e-04   3.268e-01    8.972e-01  8.972e-01    239083 -1.650e+03 -2.248e+03                   
#> Path [1] :Best Iter: [73] ELBO (-1650.264036) evaluations: (239083) 
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             614      -1.436e+03      1.632e-04   3.268e-01    8.972e-01  8.972e-01    239083 -1.646e+03 -3.113e+03                   
#> Path [3] :Best Iter: [73] ELBO (-1645.575461) evaluations: (239083) 
#> Path [2] :Initial log joint density = -11299.286295 
#> Path [4] :Initial log joint density = -11299.286295 
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.447e+03      8.684e-02   1.002e+02    1.000e+00  1.000e+00      8830 -1.650e+03 -1.853e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.447e+03      8.684e-02   1.002e+02    1.000e+00  1.000e+00      8830 -1.652e+03 -2.192e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.438e+03      1.747e-02   2.691e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     29496 -1.650e+03 -1.818e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.438e+03      1.747e-02   2.691e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     29496 -1.651e+03 -1.743e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.436e+03      1.612e-03   2.031e+01    9.959e-01  9.959e-01     61680 -1.650e+03 -2.155e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.436e+03      1.612e-03   2.031e+01    9.959e-01  9.959e-01     61680 -1.651e+03 -1.959e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.436e+03      1.714e-03   3.040e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    105267 -1.650e+03 -2.791e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.436e+03      1.714e-03   3.040e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    105267 -1.651e+03 -2.352e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.436e+03      8.248e-05   1.285e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    160746 -1.650e+03 -2.379e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.436e+03      8.248e-05   1.285e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    160746 -1.651e+03 -2.773e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             599      -1.436e+03      7.459e-04   6.347e-01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    227956 -1.650e+03 -1.779e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             599      -1.436e+03      7.459e-04   6.347e-01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    227956 -1.651e+03 -1.703e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             614      -1.436e+03      1.632e-04   3.268e-01    8.972e-01  8.972e-01    239083 -1.650e+03 -2.373e+03                   
#> Path [2] :Best Iter: [73] ELBO (-1649.861207) evaluations: (239083) 
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             614      -1.436e+03      1.632e-04   3.268e-01    8.972e-01  8.972e-01    239083 -1.651e+03 -4.241e+03                   
#> Path [4] :Best Iter: [131] ELBO (-1650.926040) evaluations: (239083) 
#> Pareto k value (2.8) is greater than 0.7. Importance resampling was not able to improve the approximation, which may indicate that the approximation itself is poor. 
#> Finished in  4.1 seconds.
fit_b_pf <- fit_spec(spec_b, pf_opts)
#> Path [1] :Initial log joint density = -11584.689950 
#> Path [3] :Initial log joint density = -11584.689950
#> Exception: Exception: Exception: neg_binomial_2_log_lpmf: Log location parameter[2] is -inf, but must be finite! (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/obs_lpmf.stan', line 35, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 13, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/delay_lpmf.stan', line 64, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 18, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 406, column 8 to line 412, column 10) 
#> Exception: Exception: Exception: neg_binomial_2_log_lpmf: Log location parameter[2] is -inf, but must be finite! (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/obs_lpmf.stan', line 35, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 13, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/delay_lpmf.stan', line 64, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 18, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 406, column 8 to line 412, column 10) 
#> Exception: Exception: Exception: neg_binomial_2_log_lpmf: Log location parameter[2] is -inf, but must be finite! (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/obs_lpmf.stan', line 35, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 13, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/delay_lpmf.stan', line 64, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 18, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 406, column 8 to line 412, column 10) 
#> Exception: Exception: Exception: neg_binomial_2_log_lpmf: Log location parameter[2] is -inf, but must be finite! (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/obs_lpmf.stan', line 35, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 13, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/delay_lpmf.stan', line 64, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 18, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 406, column 8 to line 412, column 10) 
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.402e+03      9.525e-02   2.527e+01    3.745e-01  1.000e+00      9143 -1.572e+03 -1.614e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.402e+03      9.525e-02   2.527e+01    3.745e-01  1.000e+00      9143 -1.575e+03 -1.602e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.390e+03      4.087e-03   1.345e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     30282 -1.566e+03 -1.645e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.390e+03      4.087e-03   1.345e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     30282 -1.566e+03 -1.652e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.389e+03      8.737e-04   5.800e+00    8.851e-01  8.851e-01     63154 -1.566e+03 -1.667e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.389e+03      8.737e-04   5.800e+00    8.851e-01  8.851e-01     63154 -1.566e+03 -1.667e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.389e+03      2.922e-03   1.909e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    107058 -1.566e+03 -1.769e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.389e+03      2.922e-03   1.909e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    107058 -1.566e+03 -1.821e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.389e+03      1.779e-03   1.979e+00    3.385e-01  3.385e-01    162335 -1.566e+03 -1.718e+03                   
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.389e+03      1.779e-03   1.979e+00    3.385e-01  3.385e-01    162335 -1.566e+03 -1.770e+03                   
#> Path [3] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             557      -1.389e+03      2.081e-04   2.229e-01    1.082e+00  1.082e-01    199766 -1.566e+03 -1.654e+03                   
#> Path [3] :Best Iter: [101] ELBO (-1565.984097) evaluations: (199766) 
#> Path [1] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             557      -1.389e+03      2.081e-04   2.229e-01    1.082e+00  1.082e-01    199766 -1.566e+03 -1.647e+03                   
#> Path [1] :Best Iter: [101] ELBO (-1565.616702) evaluations: (199766) 
#> Path [4] :Initial log joint density = -11584.689950 
#> Path [2] :Initial log joint density = -11584.689950 
#> Exception: Exception: Exception: neg_binomial_2_log_lpmf: Log location parameter[2] is -inf, but must be finite! (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/obs_lpmf.stan', line 35, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 13, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/delay_lpmf.stan', line 64, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 18, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 406, column 8 to line 412, column 10) 
#> Exception: Exception: Exception: neg_binomial_2_log_lpmf: Log location parameter[2] is -inf, but must be finite! (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/obs_lpmf.stan', line 35, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 13, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/delay_lpmf.stan', line 64, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 18, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 406, column 8 to line 412, column 10) 
#> Exception: Exception: Exception: neg_binomial_2_log_lpmf: Log location parameter[2] is -inf, but must be finite! (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/obs_lpmf.stan', line 35, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 13, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/delay_lpmf.stan', line 64, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 18, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 406, column 8 to line 412, column 10) 
#> Exception: Exception: Exception: neg_binomial_2_log_lpmf: Log location parameter[2] is -inf, but must be finite! (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/obs_lpmf.stan', line 35, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 13, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/include_1/stan/functions/delay_lpmf.stan', line 64, column 4, included from 
#> '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 18, column 0) (in '/var/folders/cg/c1zk6s7n061cj176r8lp7_900000gn/T/RtmpG3ClHh/model-1526e3cd2db25.stan', line 406, column 8 to line 412, column 10) 
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.402e+03      9.525e-02   2.527e+01    3.745e-01  1.000e+00      9143 -1.573e+03 -1.605e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>              99      -1.402e+03      9.525e-02   2.527e+01    3.745e-01  1.000e+00      9143 -1.573e+03 -1.604e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.390e+03      4.087e-03   1.345e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     30282 -1.566e+03 -1.641e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             199      -1.390e+03      4.087e-03   1.345e+01    1.000e+00  1.000e+00     30282 -1.566e+03 -1.643e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.389e+03      8.737e-04   5.800e+00    8.851e-01  8.851e-01     63154 -1.566e+03 -1.655e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             299      -1.389e+03      8.737e-04   5.800e+00    8.851e-01  8.851e-01     63154 -1.566e+03 -1.668e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.389e+03      2.922e-03   1.909e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    107058 -1.566e+03 -1.859e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             399      -1.389e+03      2.922e-03   1.909e+00    1.000e+00  1.000e+00    107058 -1.566e+03 -1.945e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.389e+03      1.779e-03   1.979e+00    3.385e-01  3.385e-01    162335 -1.566e+03 -1.844e+03                   
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             499      -1.389e+03      1.779e-03   1.979e+00    3.385e-01  3.385e-01    162335 -1.566e+03 -1.796e+03                   
#> Path [4] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             557      -1.389e+03      2.081e-04   2.229e-01    1.082e+00  1.082e-01    199766 -1.566e+03 -1.643e+03                   
#> Path [4] :Best Iter: [101] ELBO (-1566.085952) evaluations: (199766) 
#> Path [2] : Iter      log prob        ||dx||      ||grad||     alpha      alpha0      # evals       ELBO    Best ELBO        Notes  
#>             557      -1.389e+03      2.081e-04   2.229e-01    1.082e+00  1.082e-01    199766 -1.566e+03 -1.641e+03                   
#> Path [2] :Best Iter: [101] ELBO (-1566.272917) evaluations: (199766) 
#> Pareto k value (2.5) is greater than 0.7. Importance resampling was not able to improve the approximation, which may indicate that the approximation itself is poor. 
#> Finished in  4.6 seconds.
```

# Runtime comparison


``` r
fits <- list(
  "A: NUTS (prior init)" = fit_a_nuts,
  "A: NUTS (pathfinder init)" = fit_a_nuts_pf,
  "A: Pathfinder" = fit_a_pf,
  "B: NUTS (prior init)" = fit_b_nuts,
  "B: NUTS (pathfinder init)" = fit_b_nuts_pf,
  "B: Pathfinder" = fit_b_pf
)

runtime_dt <- data.table(
  label = names(fits),
  spec = rep(c("A (simple)", "B (mixed delays)"), each = 3),
  method = rep(
    c("NUTS\n(prior init)", "NUTS\n(pathfinder init)", "Pathfinder"),
    2
  ),
  runtime = vapply(fits, function(x) x$run_time, numeric(1))
)

knitr::kable(
  runtime_dt[, .(Spec = spec, Method = method, `Runtime (s)` = runtime)],
  digits = 1,
  caption = "Runtime in seconds for each spec and fitting method."
)
```



Table: Runtime in seconds for each spec and fitting method.

|Spec             |Method                | Runtime (s)|
|:----------------|:---------------------|-----------:|
|A (simple)       |NUTS
(prior init)      |        24.8|
|A (simple)       |NUTS
(pathfinder init) |        26.5|
|A (simple)       |Pathfinder            |         4.1|
|B (mixed delays) |NUTS
(prior init)      |        30.4|
|B (mixed delays) |NUTS
(pathfinder init) |        31.9|
|B (mixed delays) |Pathfinder            |         4.6|




``` r
ggplot(runtime_dt, aes(x = method, y = runtime, fill = spec)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    x = "Inference method", y = "Runtime (seconds)",
    fill = "Specification"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

<div class="figure">
<img src="figures/inference-methods-runtime-plot-1.png" alt="plot of chunk runtime-plot" width="100%" />
<p class="caption">plot of chunk runtime-plot</p>
</div>

# Diagnostics

Standard MCMC diagnostics (Rhat, divergent transitions, tree depth) apply to NUTS fits.
Pathfinder is a variational method and does not produce these diagnostics.


``` r
nuts_fits <- list(
  "A: NUTS (prior init)" = fit_a_nuts,
  "A: NUTS (pathfinder init)" = fit_a_nuts_pf,
  "B: NUTS (prior init)" = fit_b_nuts,
  "B: NUTS (pathfinder init)" = fit_b_nuts_pf
)

diag_dt <- rbindlist(lapply(names(nuts_fits), function(nm) {
  f <- nuts_fits[[nm]]
  data.table(
    Label = nm,
    Samples = f$samples,
    `Max Rhat` = f$max_rhat,
    `Divergent transitions` = f$divergent_transitions,
    `Max tree depth` = f$max_treedepth
  )
}))

knitr::kable(
  diag_dt, digits = 2,
  caption = "MCMC diagnostics for NUTS fits."
)
```



Table: MCMC diagnostics for NUTS fits.

|Label                     | Samples| Max Rhat| Divergent transitions| Max tree depth|
|:-------------------------|-------:|--------:|---------------------:|--------------:|
|A: NUTS (prior init)      |    1000|     1.01|                     0|              8|
|A: NUTS (pathfinder init) |    1000|     1.02|                     0|              8|
|B: NUTS (prior init)      |    1000|     1.02|                     0|              8|
|B: NUTS (pathfinder init) |    1000|     1.02|                     0|              8|



For production use, check that Rhat values are close to 1 (< 1.05) and that there are no divergent transitions.
See the [Stan help vignette](stan-help.html) for guidance on diagnosing and resolving fitting issues.

# Nowcast comparison

We compare the nowcasts from each method side by side.


``` r
nowcast_summaries <- rbindlist(lapply(names(fits), function(nm) {
  s <- summary(fits[[nm]], probs = c(0.05, 0.2, 0.8, 0.95))
  s[, label := nm]
  s[, spec := fifelse(grepl("^A:", nm), "A (simple)", "B (mixed delays)")]
  s[, method := gsub("^[AB]: ", "", nm)]
  s
}))
```

## Spec A (simple)


``` r
ggplot(
  nowcast_summaries[spec == "A (simple)"],
  aes(x = reference_date)
) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = q5, ymax = q95), alpha = 0.2, fill = "#1b9e77"
  ) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = q20, ymax = q80), alpha = 0.3, fill = "#1b9e77"
  ) +
  geom_line(aes(y = median), colour = "#1b9e77") +
  geom_point(
    data = latest_germany_hosp,
    aes(x = reference_date, y = confirm),
    size = 0.8
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~method, ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Spec A: Simple nowcasting model",
    x = "Reference date", y = "Hospitalisations"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```

<div class="figure">
<img src="figures/inference-methods-nowcast-comparison-a-1.png" alt="plot of chunk nowcast-comparison-a" width="100%" />
<p class="caption">plot of chunk nowcast-comparison-a</p>
</div>

## Spec B (mixed delays)


``` r
ggplot(
  nowcast_summaries[spec == "B (mixed delays)"],
  aes(x = reference_date)
) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = q5, ymax = q95), alpha = 0.2, fill = "#d95f02"
  ) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = q20, ymax = q80), alpha = 0.3, fill = "#d95f02"
  ) +
  geom_line(aes(y = median), colour = "#d95f02") +
  geom_point(
    data = latest_germany_hosp,
    aes(x = reference_date, y = confirm),
    size = 0.8
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~method, ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Spec B: Mixed delay model",
    x = "Reference date", y = "Hospitalisations"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```

<div class="figure">
<img src="figures/inference-methods-nowcast-comparison-b-1.png" alt="plot of chunk nowcast-comparison-b" width="100%" />
<p class="caption">plot of chunk nowcast-comparison-b</p>
</div>

# Posterior parameter comparison

We compare posterior estimates for the delay distribution parameters across methods.
These are the most directly interpretable parameters to check for agreement between inference approaches.


``` r
param_vars <- c("refp_mean_int", "refp_sd_int")

param_summaries <- rbindlist(lapply(names(fits), function(nm) {
  s <- summary(
    fits[[nm]], type = "fit", variables = param_vars
  )
  s[, label := nm]
  s[, spec := fifelse(grepl("^A:", nm), "A (simple)", "B (mixed delays)")]
  s[, method := gsub("^[AB]: ", "", nm)]
  s
}))
```


``` r
ggplot(
  param_summaries,
  aes(x = method, y = mean, colour = spec)
) +
  geom_pointrange(
    aes(ymin = q5, ymax = q95),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Inference method",
    y = "Posterior estimate (mean and 90% CrI)",
    colour = "Specification"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)
  )
```

<div class="figure">
<img src="figures/inference-methods-posterior-plot-1.png" alt="plot of chunk posterior-plot" width="100%" />
<p class="caption">plot of chunk posterior-plot</p>
</div>

Where NUTS and pathfinder posteriors agree closely, pathfinder provides a reliable and much faster approximation.
Substantial disagreement suggests the posterior is complex enough that the variational approximation is insufficient and NUTS should be preferred.

# Summary

| Method | Speed | Posterior quality | Diagnostics | Best for |
|--------|-------|-------------------|-------------|----------|
| NUTS (prior init) | Slowest | Gold standard | Full MCMC diagnostics | Final inference, publication |
| NUTS (pathfinder init) | Moderate | Gold standard | Full MCMC diagnostics | Difficult models with slow convergence |
| Pathfinder | Fastest | Approximate | Limited | Model development, exploration, quick checks |

**Practical guidance:**

- Start with **pathfinder** during model development to iterate quickly on specification choices.
- Switch to **NUTS** for final inference when results will be reported or used for decisions.
- Use **pathfinder-initialised NUTS** when standard NUTS shows convergence issues (high Rhat, many divergent transitions) or slow warmup.

For more on computational options see the [features summary](features.html).
For help with Stan diagnostics see the [Stan help vignette](stan-help.html).
